creator: eric.douzet@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

With the update of Xfce, it do not compile correctly.

I found the sources of the package at this following FTP address :

http://ftp2.ro.freebsd.org/zenwalk/source/xap/garcon/

garcon-0.1.5.tar.bz2	2011-Jan-16 15:45:02	418.9K	text/plain


Placed into the directory /usr/ports/distfiles/xfce but this is not practical. ;-))

It has to miss a theme with the dependencies, because some icons are not in their place with Xfce, but I do not know which theme.

Otherwise, the release 7.4 and 8.2 are very accomplished, thank you for this work.

Best regards,

Éric Douzet
